findings.detail: SH-4 staleness check: rejects data older than 300s (5 min). Uses datetime.fromisoformat with Z→+00:00 replacement for ISO 8601 compatibility. ValueError/TypeError caught: defaults to stale=True. When stale, all price-dependent checks (STOP_NOT_TOO_TIGHT, STOP_NOT_TOO_LOOSE, STOP_AT_MEANINGFUL_LEVEL) are auto-failed as BLOCK — safe default behavior.
data_timestamp parsing via datetime.fromisoformat() with .replace('Z', '+00:00') — safe. try/except catches ValueError and TypeError, defaulting to stale=True. No regex-based date parsing.
Receives dicts (decision_ticket, market_data) from gate3 — no direct user input. All values accessed via .get() with defaults. No command execution, no file I/O.

POSITION_WITHIN_LIMIT check enforces portfolio_pct_limit. NO_CONFLICTING_POSITIONS checks for existing opposite-direction positions on same instrument. KILL_CRITERIA_MONITORED checks monitoring hook coverage. All safety-critical checks are BLOCK severity.
datetime.now(timezone.utc) used at line 69 for staleness calculation. No bare datetime.now() calls.
